name: Hot Jalapeno Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the jalapenos (WARNING: This bread is really hot).
2. Add all ingredients in the order listed to the bread pan.
3. Select white bread and push Start.
4. Use fewer jalapenos for a milder bread. It makes deliciously unusual sandwiches, contrasting well with cheese, cucumbers, cold roast beef, and chicken. Enjoy with a pitcher of iced tea!
5. Makes 1 loaf, 8 slices. Each slice contains 138 calories, less than 1 gram dietary fiber, less than 1 gram soluble fiber, 23 grams carbohydrates, 5 grams protein, 2 grams fat (16% calories from fat), 0 mg cholesterol, 314 mg sodium, 44 mg potassium, and 59 mg calcium.
